content: By integrating the Self-Refine framework’s iterative self-feedback loop with multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms can create a two-layered self-improvement system for large language models that still retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no extra training or supervised data. This system would first generate an initial output, then pull inconsistent, conflicting solving perspectives from the model itself to identify flaws, before iteratively refining the output without external input.
